source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clear English infrastructure UI with reliable metrics, compact labels, precise numeric rhythm, and Noto Sans JP guidance for quiet Japanese interface text.
layout: Stable 8px operations grids, canopy-layer navigation, bark-line dividers, fog panels, and restrained infrastructure dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent pine forest motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Pine Forest transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a pine forest canopy motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact cluster of conifer pine treetops and branches with layered pine-green needles, fog-grey atmosphere caught in the canopy, bark-brown trunks and branch cuts, resin amber details, and clear conifer silhouette. It must read as pine forest canopy, not single bonsai, tropical palm, cedar icon, or generic landscape painting.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include canopy layers, needle texture, and enough trunk/branch structure without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full landscape horizon, no mountains, no snow scene, no cabin, no animals, no props, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Pine Forest light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Pine Forest", derived from the visible pine forest canopy cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pine Forest, Pine Forest Canopy, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from pine-green needles, fog-grey atmosphere, bark-brown trunks, moss haze, resin amber highlights, mist surfaces, and deep canopy shadow. The board must read as pine forest infrastructure, not bamboo, jungle rainforest, or generic green theme.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on fog-grey panels.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: calm infrastructure product system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, mist surfaces, pine-green primary actions, needle-ink text, bark-brown borders, resin-amber warning/status highlights, moss success states, canopy-layer navigation, fine needle texture and bark-line dividers.
Constraints: no bamboo, no tropical jungle, no Christmas decoration, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no one-note green palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pine Forest", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Pine Forest dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Pine Forest". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible pine forest canopy cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pine Forest, Pine Forest Canopy, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same pine forest system language as the visible light board: canopy-shadow panels, fog-grey text, pine-green actions, bark-brown structure, resin-amber highlights, moss-haze status, needle texture, canopy-layer navigation, and precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on deep forest surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep canopy backgrounds, fog-grey foregrounds, pine-green controls, bark borders, resin amber alerts, moss success, subtle needle and bark texture overlays, crisp 8px operations cards.
Constraints: no bamboo, no tropical rainforest, no holiday theme, no neon green, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pine Forest", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
